inputs.description:
Read docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-28-auth-plan-a-core.md — Task 3. Create app/api/auth_deps.py with get_current_user (extracts JWT from cookie) and require_role factory (returns dependency requiring minimum role level). ROLE_HIERARCHY: admin=4, full=3, limited=2, guest=1. Use EXACT code from plan.

Verify: poetry run python -c "from app.api.auth_deps import require_role, get_current_user; print('OK')"
Commit: git add app/api/auth_deps.py && git commit -m "feat: add auth dependencies — get_current_user, require_role"
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -c "from app.api.auth_deps import require_role; print('OK')"
